testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check GET /api/v1/health should return system status
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check GET /api/v1/health should return system status

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return all required health fields
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return all required health fields

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return services.database status
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return services.database status

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return queue_depth as string
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return queue_depth as string

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return timestamp as ISO 8601
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Health Check should return timestamp as ISO 8601

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 401 for invalid credentials
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 401 for invalid credentials

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 401 for non-existent user with valid sha256 format
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 401 for non-existent user with valid sha256 format

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for missing username
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for missing username

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for missing passwordSha256
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for missing passwordSha256

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for non-sha256 password (validation)
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for non-sha256 password (validation)

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for extra fields (forbidNonWhitelisted)
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/login should return 400 for extra fields (forbidNonWhitelisted)

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should allow candidate signup without email
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should allow candidate signup without email

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for examiner signup without email
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for examiner signup without email

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for invalid email format
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for invalid email format

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for non-sha256 password
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for non-sha256 password

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for empty username
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication POST /api/v1/auth/signup should return 400 for empty username

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication Successful auth flows should login seeded admin successfully
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication Successful auth flows should login seeded admin successfully

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication Successful auth flows should signup a new user then login successfully
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Authentication Successful auth flows should signup a new user then login successfully

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return paginated list of problems
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return paginated list of problems

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return items with correct field names
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return items with correct field names

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return total and page as strings
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return total and page as strings

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should support difficulty filter
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should support difficulty filter

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return page 2 correctly
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems should return page 2 correctly

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems/:id should return problem detail
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems/:id should return problem detail

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems/:id should return 404 for non-existent problem
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems/:id should return 404 for non-existent problem

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems/:id should return constraints as strings
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems GET /api/v1/problems/:id should return constraints as strings

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should return 401 without auth token
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should return 401 without auth token

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should return 400 for invalid difficulty enum
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should return 400 for invalid difficulty enum

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should allow ADMIN to create a problem
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should allow ADMIN to create a problem

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should return 403 when CANDIDATE tries to create a problem
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems (Admin) should return 403 when CANDIDATE tries to create a problem

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems DELETE /api/v1/problems/:id should return 401 without auth token
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems DELETE /api/v1/problems/:id should return 401 without auth token

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems DELETE /api/v1/problems/:id should allow ADMIN to delete a problem
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems DELETE /api/v1/problems/:id should allow ADMIN to delete a problem

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems/:id/assign should return 401 without auth token
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems/:id/assign should return 401 without auth token

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems/:id/assign should allow ADMIN to assign a problem to a user
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Problems POST /api/v1/problems/:id/assign should allow ADMIN to assign a problem to a user

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Submissions POST /api/v1/submissions should return 401 without auth token
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Submissions POST /api/v1/submissions should return 401 without auth token

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Submissions POST /api/v1/submissions should accept a submission with JWT and allow polling until terminal status
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Submissions POST /api/v1/submissions should accept a submission with JWT and allow polling until terminal status

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Submissions GET /api/v1/submissions/:id should return 404 for non-existent submission
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Submissions GET /api/v1/submissions/:id should return 404 for non-existent submission

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users should return users list
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users should return users list

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users should return user fields with correct types
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users should return user fields with correct types

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users should not expose passwordHash
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users should not expose passwordHash

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users/:username/submissions should return 404 for non-existent user
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users/:username/submissions should return 404 for non-existent user

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users/:username/submissions should return paginated submission history for existing user
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users/:username/submissions should return paginated submission history for existing user

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users/:username/submissions should support pagination parameters
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Users GET /api/v1/users/:username/submissions should support pagination parameters

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should return rankings
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should return rankings

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should return total and page as strings

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should return ranking items with correct fields
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should return ranking items with correct fields

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should support pagination
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should support pagination

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should have first rank starting at 1
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should have first rank starting at 1

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should return all ranking values as strings
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Leaderboard GET /api/v1/leaderboard should return all ranking values as strings

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return 401 without API key
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return 401 without API key

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return 401 with wrong API key
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return 401 with wrong API key

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return test cases with correct API key
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return test cases with correct API key

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return 404 for non-existent problem with correct API key
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return 404 for non-existent problem with correct API key

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return numeric fields as strings
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should return numeric fields as strings

testcase.classname: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should include hidden testcases internally, but exclude them in public problem detail
testcase.name: Code Judge API (e2e) Internal API GET /api/v1/internal/testcases/:id should include hidden testcases internally, but exclude them in public problem detail
